content.stage1_rationale: Initiate at 50% of target position at current price ~$952. Costco's business quality (wide moat, 92.9% renewal, consistent ROIC 25-30%) justifies partial exposure now. The valuation is elevated (48x normalized P/E, DCF base case $535) but the business has historically stayed expensive for extended periods. A 50% initial position captures participation if the stock continues to compound without full exposure if multiple compression materializes.
add_conditions: Add to 75% position if COST pulls back to ~$800 (-16% from current price, ~40x normalized P/E) on no fundamental deterioration
Add to 100% position if COST reaches ~$700 (-26% from current price, ~35x normalized P/E) — represents historically cheap entry for COST's quality tier
Alternatively, accelerate to 75% if FY2025 Q3 membership renewal rate holds above 91% and revenue growth sustains >8% — confirming momentum intact despite fee increase
hold_monitoring: Track membership renewal rate quarterly (threshold: 90% worldwide; below triggers review)
Track membership fee income growth annually (should grow >6%/yr to justify valuation)
Track international comparable sales — should show positive growth YoY at least 3 of 4 quarters
Monitor Amazon Fresh / Whole Foods US market share quarterly for signs of warehouse-club frequency decline

kill_criteria_candidates.trigger: Worldwide membership renewal rate falls below 89% for two consecutive quarters
kill_criteria_candidates.lagging_indicator: Membership fee income growth decelerates below 3%/yr

kill_criteria_candidates.trigger: Gross merchandise margin declines more than 150bps from FY2024 baseline (12.7% → below 11.2%) for two consecutive years
kill_criteria_candidates.lagging_indicator: Management begins discount programs or promotions to retain members — breaks the low-price-always model

kill_criteria_candidates.trigger: ROIC falls below 18% for two consecutive years (from 29.4% FY2024) — signals structural erosion of competitive advantage
kill_criteria_candidates.lagging_indicator: Operating income growth decouples from revenue growth for 3+ consecutive years

kill_criteria_candidates.trigger: International expansion produces two consecutive new-market failures: warehouse closures, significant write-downs, or <50% target-year membership enrollment in new markets
kill_criteria_candidates.lagging_indicator: International revenue share declines as a % of total for 3 consecutive years

content.reconciliation_summary: The aggressive case (buy immediately, full size) is correct that waiting for a pullback in quality compounders destroys expected value when the pullback never materializes. The conservative case is correct that 48x P/E leaves almost no valuation cushion and multiple compression from 48x to 35x is a realistic 5-year scenario independent of fundamentals. The staged entry reconciles these: participate at 50% now to avoid underexposure to a genuine compounder, but preserve dry powder for a meaningful pullback that would significantly improve the 10-year return profile. The 4 kill criteria above are the decision-forcing events — if any trigger, the position should be reviewed regardless of price action.

citations.claim: Target add price $800 corresponds to ~40x normalized P/E (normalized EPS ~$19.75)
citations.url_or_id: COST normalized EPS derived from edgar series

citations.claim: ROIC 29.4% FY2024; 18% floor represents ~40% decline, consistent with permanent moat erosion threshold
